checks.command: python3 hash check against P2 BUILD_LOCK_INPUT_MATRIX
checks.summary: No P2 locked file hash mismatches
No forbidden runtime reads or imports

validated_rules: artifact schema refs bind to the exact contracted schema path and schema hash
source_refs remain replay-bound to invalidation inputs
shared component reuse is semantic and visual-only reuse is rejected
reuse_scope resolves only to canonical element ids, approved messages, or approved exceptions
trace_refs resolve to upstream element, closure, gap, or source authority
layout boundary terms are rejected from pattern rows
every approved interaction message has presentation coverage
canonical STATE and MESSAGE elements require information presentation coverage
equivalent information modes require approved consistency exceptions
transient-only unrecoverable decision information is rejected
downstream pattern refs resolve to shared component registry ids
